name: Cornbread Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the muffin mix according to package directions in an 8-inch square pan.
2. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove the cornbread from the pan and cool it. Cut into cubes.
3. Place the cornbread cubes on a baking sheet and bake at 250 degrees F (125 C) for 1 hour.
4. In a large bowl, combine lettuce, celery, tomato, green pepper, and purple onion. Toss to mix well.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, dry mustard, salt, and pepper.
6. Pour the dressing over the salad and stir to coat evenly.
7. Stir in the cornbread cubes, mayonnaise, chopped pecans, and green onions.
8. Sprinkle with additional green onions just before serving.
